short_description: End-to-end encrypted password, file, and notes vault on ICP
full_description: Sovereign Vault is a personal security vault running entirely on the Internet Computer. Store passwords, encrypted files, and private notes with end-to-end encryption via VetKeys. No cloud, no third parties — your data is yours.
features: Encrypted file storage (up to 60KB per file)
Eject at any time — the canister keeps working
